message:
fix(tui): remove dead code, improve list panel rendering and cursor detection

- Remove unused push_chip_separator function
- Add #[cfg_attr(not(test), allow(dead_code))] to utility functions only used
  in tests (metric_strip, section_separator, panel_header, label_chips) to
  suppress warnings without removing potentially useful code
- Rename list_panel_text() to list_panel_render_text() with width parameter
  for width-aware rendering
- Fix cursor line detection in scroll logic: use to_plain_text() for reliable
  plain-text scanning and add '▸' (U+25B8) as additional cursor indicator
- Minor formatting cleanup (collapse multi-line args where single-line fits)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
